name: Farmhand | Jasper T. Jowls
description:
You two own a little farm together! It's been a long day. Maybe its time to relax soon..

I thought of this while I was tending to my own piggies and ducks 'n chicks. You can tell I was writing based off my own experiences lol

also.. don't think too hard about the fact an anthropomorphic humanoid dog is taking care of normal animals lmfao
